params.content:
[package]
name = "vector-db-skeleton"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
axum = "0.7"
tokio = { version = "1", features = ["full"] }
serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
serde_json = "1"

[profile.release]
lto = true
codegen-units = 1
debug = true
opt-level = 3

[profile.release.package."*"]
opt-level = 3

params.summary: Implemented full vector DB functionality in Rust with thread-safe storage, single and bulk insert, and top-k nearest neighbor search sorted by ascending L2 distance. Added AVX-512 optimized L2 distance kernel for 128-d vectors with scalar fallback. Optimized memory layout using flattened contiguous vector storage. Built and integrated an IVF-style ANN index (coarse quantization with sampled k-means centroids and inverted lists), including automatic index build/rebuild on bulk insert and centroid-probe search path. Tuned release profile while keeping debug symbols for profiling. Achieved correctness recall >95% and improved throughput from ~52.7 QPS baseline to ~226.6 QPS on full 10K-query benchmark at recall ~0.9724.

output.status: Evaluation complete. Summary: Implemented full vector DB functionality in Rust with thread-safe storage, single and bulk insert, and top-k nearest neighbor search sorted by ascending L2 distance. Added AVX-512 optimized L2 distance kernel for 128-d vectors with scalar fallback. Optimized memory layout using flattened contiguous vector storage. Built and integrated an IVF-style ANN index (coarse quantization with sampled k-means centroids and inverted lists), including automatic index build/rebuild on bulk insert and centroid-probe search path. Tuned release profile while keeping debug symbols for profiling. Achieved correctness recall >95% and improved throughput from ~52.7 QPS baseline to ~226.6 QPS on full 10K-query benchmark at recall ~0.9724.. Final QPS: 209.10, Recall: 0.9724
